name: open-submission-approval-workflow
description: A batteries-included AdonisJS starter kit for building modern APIs with type-safe frontend integration

scripts.db:up: docker compose -f apps/backend/compose.yml up -d pgsql mailpit
scripts.db:logs: docker compose -f apps/backend/compose.yml logs -f pgsql mailpit
scripts.db:status: pnpm --dir apps/backend exec node ace migration:status
